title: Debug duplicated rows in a target
description: Trace duplicates to a non-idempotent write, an at-least-once delivery, or a join fan-out, then fix the root cause.
body: Steps: 1. Quantify duplicates by key and find when they appeared. 2. Check the load: a retried append-insert double-writes — switch to replace-by-partition or upsert. 3. Check delivery: a streaming consumer reprocessing after rebalance needs dedup on an event key or exactly-once semantics. 4. Check joins: a one-to-many join fan-out multiplies rows — verify cardinality. 5. Re-run and confirm counts. Rollback point: rewrite the affected partition from landing data. Validation: distinct-key counts equal total counts after the fix; assuming the source is at fault before checking the load logic wastes time.
